overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a third-person perspective showing a cowboy character leading a saddled horse through open prairie grassland at night. The scene is illuminated by a warm handheld lantern as they walk along a dirt path with distant mountains silhouetted against a dark starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with dirt trail

agents.ego_description: leading a saddled horse by the reins along a dirt path through grassland at night, holding a lantern that illuminates the immediate surroundings

notable_agents.action: dark-colored horse with white markings walking calmly beside the character, being led by the reins

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a dirt trail through open prairie grassland at night, leading a horse by the reins. The warm glow of a handheld lantern illuminates the path ahead while distant mountains and rock formations are silhouetted against the dark starry sky. Tall grass surrounds the trail on both sides as they progress through the quiet, empty landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera movement through a quiet prairie landscape at night, maintaining a focused progression along a lonely dirt trail. It begins with the character leading a saddled horse by the reins, their path carved through tall, swaying grasses. As they advance, the warm, flickering glow of a handheld lantern continuously illuminates the immediate ground, contrasting with the deep shadows of the surrounding wilderness. The scene then expands to reveal the vastness of the empty landscape, where distant mountains and jagged rock formations remain silhouetted against a dark, starry sky.
